message:
fix(codegen): Add default param renaming for functions and exception handling

Changes:
- var_hoisting.zig: Add var_renames entry for function params with defaults
  (functions use {name}_param suffix, methods use original name)
- var_hoisting.zig: Handle exception-assigned variables with PyException type
- scope_analyzer.zig: Track exception assignments for proper hoisting
- try_except.zig: Improve exception handling codegen
- misc.zig: Minor expression handling fixes

Note: These changes maintain 19/65 @core1 pass rate (no regression).
Remaining compile errors are due to class forward references, not param renaming.
